'''yayanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obby|obby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obby|obby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yayanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæyængæth|yæyængæth]] || [[word:yæyængæj|yæyængæj]] || [[word:yæyængæsh|yæyængæsh]] || [[word:yæyængæ|yæyængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayayangath|yayayangath]] || [[word:yayayangaj|yayayangaj]] || [[word:yayayangash|yayayangash]] || [[word:yayayanga|yayayanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayangath|yayangath]] || [[word:yayangaj|yayangaj]] || [[word:yayangash|yayangash]] || [[word:yayanga|yayanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayafngafth|yayafngafth]] || [[word:yayafngafj|yayafngafj]] || [[word:yayafngafsh|yayafngafsh]] || [[word:yayafngaf|yayafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yayangatha|yayangatha]] || [[word:yayangaja|yayangaja]] || [[word:yayangasha|yayangasha]] || [[word:yayangaka|yayangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yayangath|yayangath]] || [[word:yayangaj|yayangaj]] || [[word:yayangash|yayangash]] || [[word:yayanga|yayanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yayangathal|yayangathal]] || [[word:yayangajal|yayangajal]] || [[word:yayangashal|yayangashal]] || [[word:yayangakal|yayangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yayangaathatha|yayangaathatha]] || [[word:yayangaajaja|yayangaajaja]] || [[word:yayangaashasha|yayangaashasha]] || [[word:yayangaaka|yayangaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yayangathan|yayangathan]] || [[word:yayangajan|yayangajan]] || [[word:yayangashan|yayangashan]] || [[word:yayangakan|yayangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yayangathaoro|yayangathaoro]] || [[word:yayangajaoro|yayangajaoro]] || [[word:yayangashaoro|yayangashaoro]] || [[word:yayangakaoro|yayangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
